libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test runs of io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1, set runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` on the native executable, e.g. by widening the existing `nativeTest.runtimeArgs` guard from only 5.0.0 to also cover 5.0.1 or Netty 4.2.x. Tests should be self-contained by starting an in-process Vert.x `HttpServer` on `127.0.0.1` for WebClient requests instead of relying on external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact includes OAuth2WebClient APIs backed by an optional `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2` dependency; avoid testing those optional APIs unless intentionally adding that dependency.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains necessary to confirm the JDK 25 native runtime properties resolve the reported failure.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Core Vert.x Web Client coverage is reachable without Docker or extra Maven dependencies, but 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final and needs the same JDK 25 native runtime properties already used for 5.0.0.
